commit.message:
Update .github/workflows/ci.yml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(ui): include seed and config in exported game log

Log header now shows seed, player count, territory
count, map shape, speed, and enabled options. Player
list includes personality types for AI players.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): show GAME OVER in spectator, fix achievement overlap

Spectator mode now shows 'GAME OVER' instead of
'DEFEAT'. Moved achievements panel higher to avoid
overlapping with buttons when many are unlocked.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

style(ui): increase options-to-buttons gap, swap order

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): fit 6 AI rows in setup, buttons side by side

Reduced AI row height from 38→34px, reserved 6
rows for spectator mode. Placed START GAME and
BACK buttons side by side to save vertical space.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(game): prevent alliances when only 2 players remain

Auto-break existing alliances and block new
proposals when alive player count drops to 2,
preventing stalemate situations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

style(ui): add emojis to fortify and reinforce log entries

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): rebuild AI rows when toggling spectator mode

In spectator mode, player 1 becomes AI-controlled,
so the setup needs playerCount rows instead of
playerCount-1. Now toggling spectator rebuilds
AI rows with correct count and player colors.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): fix slider drag, gear visibility, row spacing

- Use pointer.x instead of dragX so slider
  handles follow the mouse position exactly
- Hide gear button when cycling away from Custom
- Equalize Shape-to-Options row gap (45→55px)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): fix slider handles persisting after popup close

Slider handle graphics were added to the scene
instead of the container, surviving container
destruction. Also changed drag listener from
scene-level input.on to dragZone.on to prevent
listener accumulation across popup reopens.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove unused ReadState model

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test(game): add fuzz tests with randomized configs

50 random full-game simulations with varying player
count (2-6), map shape, grid type, fog of war,
power-ups, alliances, and personality mixes including
custom configs. Plus 7 edge case tests. Seeds printed
on failure for reproducibility.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(ai): add custom AI personality builder

Add ability to create custom AI personalities with adjustable parameters:
- Min Advantage slider (-2 to +4)
- Max Attacks slider (1 to 10, or unlimited)
- Connectivity Bonus slider (0 to 5)

Includes named preset save/load/delete via localStorage, popup editor
in SetupScene, and full integration with GameScene player creation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): change Charge power-up from flat +3 bonus to +2 extra dice

Charge now adds 2 extra dice to the attacker's roll instead of a flat +3
to the total. This lets territories with 8 dice roll 10 dice on attack,
making Charge meaningfully powerful at high dice counts.

- Rename POWER_UP_BONUS to CHARGE_EXTRA_DICE (2) and SHIELD_DEFENSE_BONUS (3)
- Roll extra dice before summing instead of adding to total after
- Update AI advantage calculation to use +2 for charge
- Shield remains as flat +3 defender bonus (passive defense)
- Add new tests for extra dice rolling and power-up consumption
- Update GAME_LOGIC.md documentation
- Replace simulation seed 123 (stalemates under new balance)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: mark phase-11 defect ticket as done

All 8 bugs fixed: seed degeneration, self-alliance,
duplicate elimination, dead alliance cleanup,
graph perf, surrender awareness, underdog logic,
undo alliance state. Plus undo config feature.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): make undo configurable in game setup

Gate undo functionality on undoEnabled config:
- Skip snapshot creation when undo is disabled
- Hide undo button and ignore Z key when disabled
- Remove undo shortcut from help overlay when disabled
- Add tests for undoEnabled persistence and validation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(game): AI surrender considers power-ups and alliances

hasPositiveAdvantageAttack() now accounts for charge power-up (+2
effective attack dice) and filters out allied targets that the AI
personality would not attack. This prevents premature surrender when
the AI has meaningful tactical options via power-ups or when alliance
restrictions falsely suggest no valid targets exist.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(game): prevent duplicate elimination events on human attacks

Capture alive players before executeAttack() and only fire elimination
events for players who were alive before but are now dead. This matches
the pattern already used in AI turn processing and prevents corrupted
achievement tracking (triple_kill, first_blood).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: rename project from xFlow to CortexLink

- All /xflow:* commands → /cortexlink:*
- Plugin slug: xflow → cortexlink
- Updated README, CHANGELOG, all skill and command files
- Bump version to 0.5.5

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Baseline

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix connection leak: use finally blocks to always close DB connections

Every database function now follows the pattern:
- conn = None before try:
- conn = get_connection() as first line inside try:
- all conn.close() calls inside try: removed
- finally: block added to ensure conn.close() is always called

This prevents connection leaks when exceptions occur between
acquiring and closing the connection.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix docstring links in MonaiAdapter (#1425)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add support for workspace compilation (#2161)

### ❔What, Why & How

<!-- Include description of the changes that will help reviewers in
their task -->

With v28 of BC the ALTool now supports workspace compilation. The key
advantage of workspace compilation is that it supports parallel
compilation which can significantly improve the overall compilation time
for large AL-Go projects.

This PR adds AL-Go support for workspace compilation by adding a new
"Compile" action. Thereby also moving the compilation out of
Run-ALPipeline.

**Limitations**
Limitations that aren't addressed in this PR but are on our radar to fix
in follow-up PRs:
* Support for Directory.packages.props 
* Support for compilation on linux (Status: Bug on Developer
Experiences)
* Support for incremental builds
* Support for compiling BCPT apps
* Support for "Previous Apps" app source validation (i.e. apps from
releases used as baseline)

Related to:
[AB#618073](https://dynamicssmb2.visualstudio.com/1fcb79e7-ab07-432a-a3c6-6cf5a88ba4a5/_workitems/edit/618073)

### ✅ Checklist

- [x] Add tests (E2E, unit tests)
- [x] Update RELEASENOTES.md
- [x] Update documentation (e.g. for new settings or scenarios)
- [x] Add telemetry

<!-- Include more checklist entries, if needed -->

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

⚡ [performance improvement] optimize planetary data extraction (#72)

* ⚡ [performance improvement] optimize planetary data extraction

Optimized `extract_refined_data.py` by:
1. Combining two separate `for row in sheet` loops into a single pass.
2. Replacing repetitive list comprehensions with a single set creation per row for $O(1)$ value lookups.

Measured improvement: ~49% speed boost on simulated data.
Verified correctness: Results match the original implementation exactly.

commit.message:
Build PetTrack MVP — full-stack pet adoption management system (#2)

* Initial plan

* Add complete PetTrack MVP application

- Next.js 16 app with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Prisma v5 schema with Pet, Location, Tag, User, PetTag, PetPhoto, PetLocationHistory models
- Credential-based JWT authentication with bcrypt password hashing
- proxy.ts for route protection (Next.js 16 convention)
- Public homepage with pet grid, search and filter
- Public pet detail page
- Admin dashboard with summary metrics
- Admin pets CRUD with tag/photo management
- Admin locations CRUD
- Admin tags CRUD with color support
- Server actions for all mutations
- Prisma seed script with realistic demo data (12 pets, 5 locations, 10 tags)
- Custom UI components (Button, Input, Label, Card, Badge, Table, Select, Textarea)
- Comprehensive README with setup instructions

Co-authored-by: keen5336 <2243916+keen5336@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/keen5336/angelofhope/sessions/60ad7e3c-78c7-47a6-a02e-a3e6c0457e36

commit.message:
refactor: remove transcript collection, restore core playlist crawler

- Remove all transcript-related functions and CLI flags
  (fetch_transcript, crawl_transcripts, fetch_transcript_ytdlp,
   Selenium transcript helpers, _timestamp_to_seconds, etc.)
- Remove transcript dependencies from requirements.txt
  (youtube-transcript-api, yt-dlp)
- Delete transcript test files (test_fetch.py, transcript_check.py)
- Add --limit option for per-playlist video cap
- Update README: correct PowerShell syntax, add --limit docs,
  add section on why transcript collection failed and future options

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: サマリーAPIのカテゴリ別集計を実装 (#14)

ExpenseService#getSummaryのカテゴリ集計ロジックを修正。
- expenses リストを Expense#getCategory() でグループ化
- カテゴリごとに合計金額を算出
- percentage は (カテゴリ合計 / 全体合計) * 100 で計算（小数点1位まで）
- total が 0 の場合は percentage を 0.0 にする
- 「未分類」固定のコメントと実装を削除

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: design minimal dynamic-prompt refined evaluation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(api): enforce squad number immutability on PUT (#529)

Add a mismatch guard in put_async: if squad_number in the request
body does not match the path parameter, return HTTP 400 Bad Request.
The path parameter is the authoritative source of identity on PUT.

Document the single-model design decision in PlayerRequestModel:
one model intentionally covers both POST and PUT, with per-operation
differences handled at the route layer.

feat: pre-batch pro epub segments to reduce timeout waste

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: clean up implemented tickets and update docs

Remove 29 implemented ticket files (phases 1-6,
spectator, replay, undo, alliances, achievements).
Keep 8 open tickets for future work.

Update README.md with full feature list and
architecture. Update GAME_LOGIC.md with power-ups,
fog of war, alliances, surrender, achievements,
config, undo, and replay systems. Update
copilot-instructions.md with all source files.

Fix TS2367 narrowing error in Alliance test.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

450 improve performance of hot paths and bump preferred sprouts version (#451)

* improve performance when checking if a component area has an opaque gradient or noise

* only intern the 'LayerRenderConf' inside the 'LayerCache' when caching makes sense to avoid interning, which produces a lot of expensive hash code computation

* improve style renderer hot path performance slightly by reducing redundant color instantiation

* avoid array allocation for all layer constants as 'values()' always returns a defensive copy

* avoid null check on every intern

* reduce array allocation for layer constants and avoid setting graphics antialiasing flag if not enabled.

* reduce array allocation for layer constants

* improve performance of query methods in 'NamedConfigs' class

* precompute constants in 'LayerCache'

* update preferred sprouts version

* avoid stream pipeline and reuse any method

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* further improve performance of boolean query methods by using the optimized "any" method instead of streaming styles

* Get rid of stream indirection

* improve code readability a bt

* improve performance some more

* make method package private

---------

commit.message:
docs: add implementation plan for pro timeout pre-batching

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): add alliance system with AI diplomacy and reputation

- Alliance data model: non-aggression pacts with duration (5 turns)
- Reputation system: 0-100, betrayal penalties, honored pact bonuses
- AI proposal/acceptance based on personality (cautious=0.7, reckless=0.1)
- AI respects alliances in move selection, personality-based breaking
- Human UI: accept/reject proposals, betray confirmation dialog
- Visual indicators: cyan borders on allied territories
- Event log, recorder, and formatter support for all alliance actions
- Replay scene handles alliance formation/breaking/expiration
- 42 tests (unit + integration) covering all alliance operations

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: design pro timeout mitigation via pre-batching

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): add achievements system with 12 achievements

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(replay): consume passive power-ups on attack in replay

Charge and shield power-ups were never cleared in replay because
replay applies battle results directly without calling executeAttack.
Now consumes charge on attacker and shield on defender during attacks.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(replay): fix power-up display in replay mode

- Add powerUpSpawn case to apply spawns to territory state
- Disable powerUpsEnabled during endTurn to prevent wrong-RNG spawns
- Power-ups now correctly appear, get used, and cycle in replay

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): add player panel to replay scene and auto-release hook

- Add UIRenderer to ReplayScene (was missing entirely)
- Set spectator mode so end-turn/undo buttons are hidden
- Add .husky/post-commit hook for auto-release after every commit
- Post-commit skips chore(release) commits to prevent infinite loops

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): track power-up spawns in game logic and recording

- spawnPowerUp() returns PowerUpSpawnInfo (territoryId, type, owner)
- endTurn() returns EndTurnResult with spawn data
- Spawn info flows from game logic → recorder → text log
- New powerUpSpawn action type in GameRecorder
- EventFormatter formats spawn events with ⚡ prefix
- GameScene logs spawns via return value, not snapshot diffing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test(game): add full game simulation tests across multiple seeds

Runs complete AI-vs-AI games using pure game logic:
- 5 seeds × 5 assertions (termination, winner, recording, eliminations)
- Determinism verification (same seed → same result)
- 2-player and 6-player variants
- Text log export validation with power-up actions
- Recording structure integrity checks

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add unique favicon package for Social Media Dist

- Added favicon.ico, icon.svg (cyan megaphone + signal waves)
- Added apple-icon.png and android-chrome icons
- Added site.webmanifest with theme color #06b6d4
- Updated layout.tsx metadata with icon and manifest references

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): add power-up logging to recorder and text log export

- useAIPowerUps returns structured PowerUpResult with GameAction data
- AI power-up usage (fortify/reinforce) now recorded in GameRecorder
- Eliminations recorded consistently in both normal and instant mode
- generateTextLog() produces full text log from GameRecording
- Export Log button on GameOverScene downloads .txt file

commit.message:
chore(config): automate versioning with husky and commitlint

- Add husky for git hooks (pre-commit runs tests, commit-msg validates)
- Add commitlint with conventional commits config
- Add commit-and-tag-version for automated version bumps
- Custom updater syncs src/version.ts with package.json
- npm run release auto-determines bump from commit history
- Update copilot instructions with new workflow

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add semantic versioning and version display

- Add src/version.ts as single source of truth for game version
- Display version on main menu (bottom-right corner)
- Add scripts/bump-version.mjs for patch/minor/major bumps
- Add npm scripts: version:patch, version:minor, version:major
- Update copilot instructions with conventional commit rules,
  version bump workflow, and expanded module documentation
- Bump to v1.1.0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add seed display and reserve dice to HUD

- Show current game seed below the HUD panel (subtle gray text)
- Show reserve dice in player info (e.g. '7T 24D +3R') when > 0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix AI discarding unusable active power-ups

When fortify/reinforce can't be used (all neighbors maxed, territory
at max dice, no valid target), AI now discards them instead of leaving
them on the map forever. Also allows fortify to non-frontier neighbors
when no frontier target exists.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Regenerate preview seed each time SetupScene opens

Phaser reuses scene instances, so the field initializer only ran once.
Now previewSeed is refreshed in create(), giving a different map and
game outcome each time.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
